title: Default rcql suite profile to security-and-quality
description: Change default analyze profile to security-and-quality and honor repo codeql config query selector when supported.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing analyze-suite resolver: default security-and-quality, optionally override from .github/codeql/codeql-config.yml queries uses selector, and clear error for unsupported selectors. Adding tests and updating README examples.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented: default analyze suite profile is now security-and-quality; repo queries uses selector can override to code-quality/security-and-quality. Added clear invalid-config error path and tests. Validation: pytest -q (123 passed), make check, and Biblicus rcql --lang python now returns 12 findings (exit 1).

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Shipped in commit df143e5 on develop. rcql now defaults to security-and-quality and honors supported queries uses selectors from codeql-config.yml for analyze-suite selection.
